name: Zucchini Bread 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare an 8 1/2 x 4 x 2 1/2 inch loaf pan or a 9 x 5 x 3 inch pan by greasing with oil, lecithin, or light spray.
2. Finely grate the zucchini and set aside to drain.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour, soy flour, nonfat dry milk powder, baking soda, salt, and walnuts (if using).
5. In a blender, puree the applesauce, egg or equivalent, and crushed pineapple with juice on high speed until smooth.
6. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix evenly.
7. Squeeze out the zucchini (should yield about 1/2 cup) and add it to the batter, blending well.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
9. Bake for 70 minutes at 350°F or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Remove the bread from the pan and let cool to room temperature.
11. Wrap the cooled bread tightly and refrigerate.
